name: Pretty Party Mousse
recipeIngredient: 20 California dried figs, stewed and cut up
1 cup Evaporated milk or light cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the vanilla wafers and cut the figs into a saucepan.
2. Add evaporated milk or cream, sugar, and instant coffee to the saucepan.
3. Place over medium heat and stir constantly until the cookies and figs are well blended with the liquid.
4. Chill until cold.
5. Stir in cinnamon and vanilla.
6. Meanwhile, mince walnut meats and place them in a moderate oven (350°F) for about 10 minutes or until crisp.
7. Whip cream, reserving one-fourth for garnishing.
8. Place ice cream in a mixing bowl and stir until softened.
9. Quickly add the fig cookie mixture, nuts, and whipped cream to the ice cream.
10. Combine thoroughly, working quickly.
11. Turn the mixture into a mold and place it in the freezing compartment of the refrigerator.
12. Freeze until firm.
13. To serve, dip quickly into just-warm water, turn out on chilled serving plates, garnish with whipped cream that has been sweetened and flavored with vanilla, and surround with whole figs.
14. Serves 10 to 12.
